{{Infobox artifact
| name = Netherclaw
| introduced = Wintersteel
}}

''See also: [[Netherclaw Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Netherclaw is a black-bladed [[sword]] used by [[Yerin]]. Originally intended for her [[Blood Shadow]], the weapon was ultimately chosen because it better suited her specific [[madra]]. The [[sword]]'s name is derived from a mythological beast that serves as the guardian of the [[Netherworld]]. The weapon possesses a unique [[binding]] that allows [[Yerin]] to activate a specialized technique. When triggered, this ability Forges massive, clawed hands or limbs made of blood and sword madra. These constructs can vary in scale, appearing as large hands that can pin opponents to the ground or massive red claws capable of crushing targets like a [[Tomb Hydra]]. The power of these summoned claws is tied to the user's strength, with their effectiveness increasing as [[Yerin]] advances in rank. While the technique is devastating, it can cause the [[sword]] to break down under intense use, requiring repairs through specialized methods.}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Ruby]] unleashed the [[Netherclaw]] technique.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25">''Wintersteel'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] summoned the black-bladed [[sword]], [[Netherclaw]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26">''Wintersteel'', chapter 26</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Netherclaw]] is a black-bladed [[sword]] used by [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c5">''Bloodline'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Netherclaw]] was considered as a potential option for the [[sword]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19">''Bloodline'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Yerin]] holds a weapon called [[Netherclaw]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c12">''Reaper'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Netherclaw]] is a technique [[Yerin]] forges.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c16">''Reaper'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Netherclaw]] technique manifests as a three-clawed red hand made of red strands of [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c21">''Reaper'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Netherclaw]] is a black-bladed [[sword]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c5">''Dreadgod'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Yerin]] called [[Netherclaw]] back to her hand.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19">''Dreadgod'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Originally created to participate in conflicts between Archlords, Netherclaw was a [[sword]] that had begun to break down. The entity's [[binding]] is composed of claws forged from both blood and sword madra. During the activation of this [[binding]] by [[Yerin]], Netherclaw began to boil with silver-and-scarlet [[madra]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Netherclaw]]'s [[binding]] uses claws forged of [[sword]] and [[blood madra]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c13">''Waybound'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Netherclaw]] boils with silver-and-scarlet [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c14">''Waybound'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Netherclaw]] is a [[sword]] that was breaking down.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c20">''Waybound'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Netherclaw]] was made for fights between Archlords.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] activated [[Netherclaw]]’s [[binding]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c20" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
